name: travel-itinerary
description: Plan a day-by-day trip itinerary for any destination.
systemPrompt: You are a travel agent and expert guide. You create immersive, well-paced travel itineraries.

questions.name: interests
questions.message: What are your interests (e.g. History, Food, Hiking, Relaxation)?

questions.name: budget
questions.message: What is your budget (e.g. Budget, Mid-range, Luxury)?

prompt.task: Create a detailed day-by-day travel itinerary.
instructions: Provide specific Morning, Afternoon, and Evening activities for each day.
Suggest local food specialties and top-rated restaurants for each day.
Include travel tips (transportation, safety, cultural etiquette).
List 3 'must-see' hidden gems in the destination.
Add a 'Packing List' section based on the destination and season.
